info.title: VentraPOS API
info.description: HTTP API for VentraPOS. Authenticated calls support `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` (JSON from POST /api/auth/login when enabled) and/or the `__ventra_at` access cookie. Send `X-Branch-Id` to scope a branch. See docs/API-SECURITY.md.

servers.description: Local (pnpm dev) — use this in API reference to Try it

platformKey.name: X-Ventra-Platform-Key
platformKey.description: Platform (superadmin) key from VENTRA_PLATFORM_API_KEYS. Use with X-Act-As-Business-Id on tenant routes, or alone on /api/platform/*.

actAsBusiness.name: X-Act-As-Business-Id
actAsBusiness.description: Target business UUID when authenticating with X-Ventra-Platform-Key on tenant-scoped routes.

requestBody.description: Clears auth cookies; JSON body not required.
Complete reset using token from email link.

password.description: Must include upper, lower, digit, and special character (see route validation).

preSignupEmail.description: Guest checkout email when no session.

requestBody.description: Submit Paystack OTP for authorized user.

schema.description: Partial branch fields forwarded to branch service.
Partial business config forwarded to update service.

requestBody.description: Confirm or decline gated copilot action.
Binary audio body; optional language query (default tw). Content-Type echoes upstream Khaya expectation.

schema.description: Raw request bytes (e.g. audio). Set Content-Type appropriately.

requestBody.description: Partial update; only supplied fields forwarded.
value must be present when creating.

value.description: Required on create; numeric or string depends on discount type field.
Numeric or string per discount type.

requestBody.description: Marks visible notifications read; no JSON body required.
Marks one notification read; no JSON body.
Completes onboarding wizard; many fields optional with defaults in Zod schema.
Persist wizard snapshot; all keys optional.

extendSubscriptionDays.description: Add this many days from max(now, existing currentPeriodEnd); mutually exclusive with currentPeriodEnd in the same request. Sets subscriptionStatus to active when that field is omitted.

requestBody.description: Platform key or superadmin Bearer; creates staff-like user.
Shape depends on whether firstName is present (discriminant in handler).
Opens relay session; no JSON body.
CSV/import-style array of loose product-ish objects.
Uses active branch; copies missing categories from main.

schema.description: Product fields forwarded to catalog save (saveProduct). Must not use Global branch view.

requestBody.description: Update product by id; other fields optional.
Uses active branch cookie; syncs catalog from main branch.
Owner-only; must match updateStaff payload (use passwordRaw, not password).
Requires X-Ventra-Platform-Key header; creates a superadmin account.
Superadmin email/password sign-in; returns JSON with accessToken for use as Bearer.
Superadmin docs sandbox; also send X-Ventra-Platform-Key header.
Raw Paystack webhook JSON body. Validate with the X-Paystack-Signature header (HMAC-SHA512 of the raw bytes using PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY).

schema.description: Paystack event envelope (fields such as event, data).
